introSection: Dragon's Flight Coaster was a steel kiddie dark ride roller coaster previously located at Rainbow's End in Manukau City, Auckland, New Zealand.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a Dragon.

fullText:
Dragon's Flight Coaster was a steel kiddie dark ride roller coaster previously located at Rainbow's End in Manukau City, Auckland, New Zealand.



Green track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble a Dragon.
